title: Ryuho
summary:
Ryuho may refer to:

Ryuho Okawa (born 1956), founder of Happy Science (a new Japanese religion)
Ryūhō Masayoshi (born 1977), Japanese sumo wrestler
Ryuho, a character from the anime series s-CRY-ed
Japanese aircraft carrier Ryūhō
